  11. When the second set is shorter than the first, tr repeats its last character to pad it out.
  12. Because it works strictly at the single-byte character level, tr is blazingly fast.

✻ Crunched for 13s

❯ /compact

✻ Compacting conversation… (19s)
  ▰▰▰▰▰▰▰▰▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱ 19%

  ❯ Reply with exactly: QUEUED-OK. Nothing else.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯ Press up to edit queued messages
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ctx: 4%/1M | ram: 0.4/0.6gb | main
  Opus 4.8 (1M context) | effort:xhigh | think:on
